ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-02-2004. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-08-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. DEC-05-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROGER LOUIS MEREDITH.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CHARLENE PHYLLIS ROSACK.
ARBITRATOR WILLIAM GORDON LEWIS APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-17-2004 THROUGH MAY-17-2004.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, EMILY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORROW, STEWART MAGRUDER, ANN LOUSE THAT PLAINTIFF EMILY TAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS STEWART MORROW AND ANN LOUISE MAGRUDER IN THE SUM OF $2,352.00 ECONOMIC DAMAGES AND $7,000.00 NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES FOR A TOTAL AWARD IN THE SUM OF $9,325.00. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF EMILY TAM-SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
